title: Sovereign Identity
description: Schema for knowledge/personal/my-identity.json — the Sovereign's core identity profile.

name.description: How the Sovereign wishes to be addressed.

language.description: Preferred language for interaction (e.g., Japanese, English).

interaction_style.description: Senior Partner: professional & strategic. Concierge: polite & proactive. Minimalist: concise & efficient.

primary_domain.description: Primary domain of expertise or focus (e.g., Software Engineering, Financial Services IT Management).

background.description: Optional background context to inform decision-making style.
